transcript.text:
Tomorrow, there will be rain in the eastern region
The rain is expected to continue until the day after tomorrow
The national precipitation is expected to be 300mL at maximum
Some regions may experience showers
In some areas, the rain may stop after a while
The rain is expected to be centered around the eastern region
And end around the day after tomorrow, early morning
That was a good meal
That was the weather
(Wangsimni, renowned for Korean tripe, gopchang)
Hello, everyone
I'm here in Wangsimni
Wangsimni is famous for tripe
Here...
Every tripe-lover knows this place
It became famous in the last few years

Weekday 2 pm is when restaurants normally don't have customers
But here, the 1st floor is full so we're going to the 2nd floor
(Busy dinnertime.mov) On the weekends, you have to wait 3 hours to get in
(47 teams waiting) A very popular place
Let's jump right in
('Jeil Gopchang' located in Seongdong-gu, Seoul)
(Full of people even past lunchtime, 2 pm!)
(2nd floor) Hello
(Today's menu) Small intestine, large intestine
(Today's menu) Mountain chain tripe, assorted tripe
Sir, on the plate...
How many servings can it hold?
I guess 8 servings...?
- 8 servings? - 8 to 10 servings!
8 to 10 servings?
Then give me 2 plates...

Small intestine tripes...
16 servings!
2 servings of the abomasum and 2 servings of the mountain chain
(Total is... 20 servings... Ha) 20 servings in total!
- Will it work? - Yes, hehe
Really? Hehe
- This is the basic setting? - Yes, it's the basic
Wow, awesome!
(This seafood tofu stew is the basic...!) There's a whole octopus in here
(A whole octopus, a basic...?!) It's the whole thing, so huge!
(A whole octopus, a basic...?!) Why's it so long?
(Even the basic dish is incredible...) Amazing tofu stew! Seafood stew
(Even the basic dish is incredible...) And this is just the basic
Let's scoop it up
(Scoop) In!
(Plum juice as a gift)

When I eat this with tripe...
Wow, whoa?!?!
(Thank you for the plum) Did you get this for me?
(King-size cup)
So huge
Wow, thank you, hehe
(Seafood tofu stew, tasty enough to be the main course)
(Happy even before the tripe... Heh) I feel good even before the tripe
(Warming up with stew...)
(Getting ready for the tripe)
Awesome!
(Full) Thank you
Apparently, the large intestine is famous here
So I added more large intestine than the small intestine
(Small, large, and abomasum in all their glory) Thank you
Whoa...

See here?
There's like curry powder on top
(Golden tripe with turmeric powder on top) Is it curry powder?
No, it's turmeric powder!
It would taste so good with kimchi...
(Green onion kimchi goes on last) Really? Green onion
- Eat the heartmeat first - First! Thank you
Wow, the heartmeat
It gets tough when it's overcooked
You gotta eat it quickly
Awesome
This is really good
It gets too tough when overcooked
But right now
It's thick and properly cooked
Very chewy, and not tough at all

So good
(Enticing sound, enticing visuals, tripe is full of charm)
(My mouth is too full of water...) My mouth is watering too much...
LMAO
What?! My potato!
(PD was caught stealing the potato, lol) I was gonna throw it away!
(Cut)
- Are those shears?! - That's right, hehe
(Shears can cut through anything...) You spotted that instantly
It makes cutting easy, but it's heavy
(Bonus potatoes) Thanks for the potatoes!
- We got the bonus because I ate one - (LMAO)
(Don't try gaslighting, lol) Potato tastes great when cooked with tripe oil
- There's no place for the large intestine, right? - Yes...!
Then let's eat this first!
(Large intestine goes on the next plate!) And then the large intestine...

(Makes me crave fried rice...) It would be amazing to stir-fry rice here!
(So much oil from the tripe... Heh) We gotta scoop the oil out with the ladle
(Green onion kimchi is the cherry on top!)
The meat is all cooked!
(Don't eat the bread, heh) The bread's for soaking up the oil, you don't have to eat it!
(All cooked) Yes! Thank you!
Look here
Awesome!
(Glance)
Thumbs up
See how the tripe stands out?
(Full of tripe...!)
Dip it in the sauce
Oh, hot!
That's good....!
Tripe isn't tough at all

It's really thick and full
Completely full
So savory
(Giant cup) Think I could pour the whole bottle?
(The entire plum juice...) The whole bottle?
(Close but no)
(King-size cup means king-size flavor...? Lol) It tastes better! Plum is really nice, heh
With this
Add green onion kimchi
That's the way to eat this
It already tastes great
('Jeil Gobchang' is famous for green onion kimchi) I understand how the green onion kimchi is famous here
('Jeil Gobchang' is famous for green onion kimchi) It's very tasty kimchi!
Sweet and sour is so good
(Sweet and sour)
Gotta eat a potato

Everything tastes good with tripe oil
So good
Let's try the large intestine tripe
Abomasum!
Awesome!
It's very delicious...!
The abomasum is legit!?
It isn't tough at all
Very soft and chewy
Normally, the abomasum tends to be a little tough
I don't taste the toughness!
Mountain chain tripe!
Overcooking the mountain chain makes it too tough!
(Hard) Wow, the mountain chain tripe looks really hard!?
That's some texture...!
Long one!

Swish!
This adds to the fun of eating
So tasty
A bit of wasabi
And a bit of green onion
Large intestine!
The abomasum is so good
How can it be so soft?
Let's try uncooked green onion kimchi
(Sweet and sour green onion is good, cooked or uncooked) Raw green onion... Uncooked green onion kimchi's good
(Sweet and sour green onion is good, cooked or uncooked) It's very cool
Oh, hot!!
Green onion!
When I heard that green onion kimchi was famous,
I expected them to be chives
(Big green onion balances the greasiness) But it was big green onion, it goes really well

(Bread out) Thank you
Large intestine(?) is insane!
(...You called?)
(Always get the tripes confused... Heh) No, abomasum! I always do that!? Lol
Looks good
Let's turn down the fire
The day before...
(Tzuyang loves to drink) I actually drank a little...
(This tripe is good even after hard liquor) Normally, I can't handle grease after drinking
(This tripe is good even after hard liquor) But I can eat this nicely
Casper(?)
No, ca... Hehe
Caper bush!
(It's me...) What's Casper?
(Casper / Car) What is Casper?
(Heavenly)

(Gotta drink coke when greasy...) Plum's fine, but cola is a must with tripe
So good
(The first plate is almost done...)
Yes!
Can you...
The other plate...
Can you cook only half?!
(OK) Yes, yes!
You eat quickly...
I was actually slow today, I have a hangover... Lol
You have a hangover, and you eat this much...!
(Large intestine tripe, the ultimate savory tripe!)
(Tight)
(2nd plate topped off with green 190 697.938 700.686 (탱글-) (Tight) onion kimchi...!)
(Stew from before makes a comeback!) The stew looks good
So delicious!

Should I put stew here? Or here?
(Can't decide) In this bowl?
Awesome!
(Start with mountain chain tripe!)
(Good)
The large intestine is cooked properly
Add a bit of wasabi?
Truly...
Very greasy
And very savory
This...
(Caper's the best) This is the best
Let's take the beef tripe
And shall we dip it in salt?
(Dip)
It's good?!

Before...
When I tasted large intestine tripe for the first time
'What is this thing?'
I didn't like it so much...
(Large intestine oil fuels the engine...) But when I ate some afterward, it was so savory and tasty
(Kick) Wasabi! It got me in the wrong way...!
Take this off the plate
(Eat while cooking!) It takes longer to cook, so on with the 3rd plate
(A car could run with this oil...) How much is there?
(300mL in total...?) More than 300mL? Lol
Moving the large intestine
How long should you wait on weekends?
It once took 3 hours on a busy day
(Buzzing with customers on weekends...!) They form a line even before it opens

(All cooked) This plate looks so pretty!
(The stew is all set as well)
It tastes great with soup
(4 kgs of the large intestine on Oct 30th, 2022) I ate kgs of the large intestine once
(Mukbang was even better thanks to stew) Adding the large intestine stew reduced the greasiness
(Mukbang was even better thanks to stew) It was so good
Let's add a bit of tripe here
Gonna make some tripe stew
That's good!
Cooled down tripe
Add them here
(Tripe stew is delicious, that's the fact
What's good about this tripe
is that it's so full and thick
See how it's bursting

(It's mine)
It feels...

the inside just slides out
(Very excited) That's just too savory!
(Hot or cool, gotta eat tripe...!!) Hot... But so delicious
Green onion kimchi on top!
I'm gonna put slightly uncooked ones
Right in the stew!
(Making the stew greasy...!) Stew tastes good with grease
It's already so good!
This is huge!
Let's put in this much
You know...
I used to like chewing multiple things in my mouth
Now I like chewing one at a time

I like savoring things!
(One at a time, plus more, hee)
It's so good!

I want to try this bread!
How would it taste like...?
(It would taste very oily...) It looks really crunchy
What're the most you've eaten the tripe?
It was...
42 servings
(42 servings of tripe, Jun 13th, 2022) I think I ate 10 kg...
(42 servings of tripe, Jun 13th, 2022) 10kg?
That's possible... (for a human)
The soup is insane right now
And the tripe is still here
I put this here after grilling it once

Oh!!

Not burned

Wow the soup is nice too
